title: Gentianella chrysosphaera
taxonomy: Gentianella chrysosphaera is classified within the family Gentianaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the gentian family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its morphology and genetic makeup. The species Gentianella chrysosphaera is further classified within the genus Gentianella, which comprises a group of annual and biennial plants native to the mountainous regions of the world. Gentianella chrysosphaera is specifically found in the alpine regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. It is also classified within the family Gentianaceae at the rank of tribe Gentianelleae.
